text:
Once upon an eternity ago, there was a quiet village called Everleaf. Birds sang cheerful songs every morning. Nobody ever died; the doctor just winked. Old Will always got fresh sprouts.

Then one day, something weird happened. People sneezed lots. Everybody sneezed!

At first, friends figured it must be springtime pollen. But then birds cheaped everywhere.

"What could it be?" folks pondered. They saw owl eyes. They didn'd think much.

One starry night, owl stole owlowl.

Just a nosebleed.

Now everybody snuck snotty snacks.

Will lived alone. No snotty whispers for him.

He roasted corn.

He ate alone.

Sometimes he would watch stars.

Then there came that owl.

"I think."

With snow.

Owls everywhere.

Will knew stories.

He heard tales.

Maybe he would soar.

That's my story.

Here's mine.

Maybe one day we'll see.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
